headline: Argus Research Downgrades Eversource Energy to Hold
summary: Argus Research  analyst Marie Ferguson   downgrades Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) from Buy to Hold.

headline: Connecticut AG, agencies ask FERC to cut Eversource, Avangrid RTO adder
summary: A new state law requires the utilities to participate in ISO New England, making them ineligible for an extra 0.5% return on equity, according to a complaint filed at the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission.
